title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Johnson & Johnson India
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!
